content:
- Completed the task end-to-end: shared postmaster ADT extracted, API reload endpoint now sequences API cert reload then managed postmaster SIGHUP, tests/docs/task metadata updated.
- Validation is green on the final tree: make check, make lint, make test, and make test-long all passed, and I reran lint after the docs reference update to keep the final tree green.
- Next step is only repository closeout: git add/commit with the required task-finished message and git push.
